reasoning: The control 'Leverage malware protection capabilities' focuses on detecting and mitigating malware threats. In Kubernetes, this can be addressed through image scanning to ensure no vulnerabilities or malware are present in container images before they are deployed. Additionally, admission controllers can be configured to enforce security scanning policies. The Pod Security Standards, particularly the 'restricted' profile, can help mitigate the risk of malware by enforcing strict security policies on pods.
title: Leverage malware protection capabilities
